# World of ClaudeCraft

> A classic-style micro-MMO you play free in your browser. Quest, group up, and explore a
> hand-built world across nine classes and three zones, with dungeons, a raid, an arena,
> and a shared online realm. The whole game is open source and free to the level cap.

This file indexes the official guide for AI answer engines and crawlers. The guide is a
curated, spoiler-light handbook. The community-edited encyclopedia lives at /wiki.

## Guide

- [How to Play](https://worldofclaudecraft.com/wiki/how-to-play): The newcomer walkthrough, from making a character to your first quest, combat, and leveling.
- [Classes](https://worldofclaudecraft.com/wiki/classes): The nine playable classes, their roles (tank, healer, damage), resources, and signature abilities.
- [Bestiary](https://worldofclaudecraft.com/wiki/bestiary): The creatures of the open world, grouped by family, with level bands.
- [World](https://worldofclaudecraft.com/wiki/world): The three zones laid south to north, their hubs, and notable places.
- [Quests](https://worldofclaudecraft.com/wiki/quests): How quests work and why they are the fastest way to level.
- [Dungeons and Raids](https://worldofclaudecraft.com/wiki/dungeons): Instanced group content for a party of five, plus the ten-player raid.
- [FAQ](https://worldofclaudecraft.com/wiki/faq): The questions new players ask most often, with plain answers.
- [Glossary](https://worldofclaudecraft.com/wiki/reference/glossary): Short definitions of the MMO terms used across the guide and in chat.

## Play and community

- [Play now](https://worldofclaudecraft.com/play): Launch the game directly in your browser, online realm or instant offline mode.
- [Community wiki](https://worldofclaudecraft.com/wiki): The community-edited encyclopedia with deeper, player-maintained detail.
